major-image.canonicalEvidence: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The spell lasts until dispelled, without requiring Concentration, if cast with a level 4+ spell slot.
major-image.structuredState: Scaling Rule 1 records special_text duration/concentration override.
major-image.jsonState: Runtime scaling has no typed duration or concentration override.
major-image.issue: Closed: Major Image's level 4+ duration and concentration override is now structured and runtime-mapped.
major-image.recommendedTemplateChange: Closed by changing Scaling Rule 1 to slot_level_table for duration.concentration.
major-image.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by runtime higherLevelScaling slot_level_table entry for level 4+ until dispelled without concentration.
major-image.closedReason: Major Image now records its level 4+ until-dispelled, no-concentration scaling in structured markdown and runtime JSON.

mass-healing-word.canonicalEvidence: Up to six creatures of your choice that you can see within range regain Hit Points equal to 2d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.
mass-healing-word.jsonState: Runtime targeting is multi with maxTargets 6.
mass-healing-word.issue: The up-to-six target choice is represented.
mass-healing-word.recommendedTemplateChange: No target-count change required for this row.

mass-healing-word.canonicalEvidence: The healing increases by 1d4 for each spell slot level above 3.
mass-healing-word.structuredState: Scaling Rule 1 records special_text healing scaling.
mass-healing-word.jsonState: Runtime HEALING effect now has bonusPerLevel +1d4.
mass-healing-word.issue: The higher-slot healing increase is represented in runtime scaling.
mass-healing-word.recommendedTemplateChange: No scaling change required for this row.
mass-healing-word.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by changing runtime scaling bonusPerLevel to +1d4.
